conservative.name: Come, Face Me!
conservative.requirements: Target within hearing distance, can understand you

success.description: You successfully evoke your target's sense of honor, compelling him to engage with you. At the end of each round, while this card is recharging, if your target is not engaged with you, he will suffer 2 stress
As above, additionally, if he attacks your allies, he will take 1 additional stress and add to attack rolls

boon.description: Your target gains the Rattled condition while this card is recharging

bane.description: Your target gains the Inspired condition while this card is recharging

reckless.name: Come, Face Me!
reckless.requirements: Target within hearing distance, can understand you

success.description: You successfully pierce your target's pride and he exerts himself to face you and defend his honour. At the end of each round, while this card is recharging, if your target is not engaged with you, he suffers 2 fatigue
As above, additionally, if he attacks your allies, he will take 1 additional fatigue and add to any attack rolls

boon.description: Your target gains the Demoralised condition while this card is recharging

bane.description: Your target gains the Inspired condition while this card is recharging
